title: M.C.K: Macharla Chunaav Kshetra
subTitle: A police officer is appointed as a district collector in Andhra Pradesh. Soon, he challenges a nefarious politician to end his corrupt activities.

title: Super Daddy
subTitle: A man dealing with a financial crisis and a prosthetic leg struggles to get his daughter operated on for a heart problem.

title: Vaastu Shastra
subTitle: A couple and their sister move to their new house with their young son, but soon discover that an old tree outside the house holds a strange curse which is haunting their house.

title: Operation Valentine
subTitle: Embarking on a deadly mission, Indian Air Force pilots put their lives on the line as they attempt to join forces to protect their country against rival entities.

title: Love Story
subTitle: A young man, who belongs to a wealthy family, falls in love with a woman. As they get involved in a romantic relationship, the couple are forced to deal with various challenges.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
subTitle: After an accident, Ruhaan decides to help Reet, which leads him to her family's ancestral mansion, which is haunted by a vengeful spirit.

title: Ek Chatur Naar
subTitle: A seemingly innocent woman unsettles a small town as her sharp wit and hidden motives spark a tense and darkly comic clash of minds.

title: Dam Sharks!
subTitle: Executives on a weekend trip find themselves in danger when they learn that a storm has caused the local river to become infested with sharks.

title: CID
subTitle: Team CID is urgently called to a housing society regarding something terrible in the building. Soon, the team enters the apartment and are shocked to see a woman covered in blood, holding a crowbar.

title: CID
subTitle: On the night of a famous designer's fashion show, one model goes missing and another is found dead. Soon, the CID team rushes to handle the case.

title: CID
subTitle: A series of murders targeting bus conductors every Sunday shocks the CID, as victims are found beheaded with no trace of blood or their missing heads. Determined to catch the killer, the team goes undercover.

title: CID
subTitle: A series of murders targeting bus conductors every Sunday shocks the CID, as victims are found beheaded with no trace of blood or their missing heads. Determined to catch the killer, the team goes undercover.

title: CID
subTitle: To threaten their parents, a couple hangs two skeletons on a tree. Soon, on investigating, the CID team finds out that the couple has gone missing and they seek the help of their friend Dheeraj.

title: CID
subTitle: When Rekha returns from a trip, she finds her father murdered. Despite living in a huge colony with many neighbours and friends, there is no witness to a murder committed in broad daylight.

title: CID
subTitle: Vishal's fiancee is helping him find the culprits behind his missing sister. Later, team CID steps in when she too disappears and they bump into Rocky, an elusive man, who helps them find a suspect.

title: Mere Badle Ki Aag
subTitle: Annavaram pays a visit to his sister and brother-in-law, who reside in Hyderabad. While he is there, he is conned by thugs. Enraged, he decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Kabhi na kabhi
subTitle: A gangster kills his whistleblower after being released from prison. However, the murder leads to a cycle of violence after the dead man turns out to be the father of the gangster's nemesis.

title: Helmet
subTitle: A group of bungling robbers target a truck anticipating to steal valuable electronics, only to find surprising contents that throw their plans into disarray.

title: Krishna Vrinda Vihari
subTitle: Krishna, a young man from an orthodox Brahmin family, falls in love with Vrinda, a woman unable to have children. To gain his family's approval, Krishna elaborates a lie to convince them to agree to the marriage.

title: Bhagmati Returns
subTitle: An aspiring filmmaker finds a producer for his horror movie and pitches the idea of a director being haunted by a ghost. However, the latter is unaware that the story is based on the former's life.

title: Shaitaan
subTitle: A family's farmhouse holiday turns sinister when an enigmatic guest possesses their daughter, leaving them at his mercy.

title: Jumanji: The Next Level
subTitle: After Spencer goes missing, his team of confidantes comes back to Jumanji to go to the undiscovered regions and support him in escaping the world's most lethal game.

title: CID
subTitle: During a birthday party, a young lady named Sheetal gets murdered and is left inside a water park. Later, the CID team is called when her body is found floating lifelessly in a swimming pool.

title: CID
subTitle: Jayantilal, a successful businessman, is found dead under mysterious circumstances. When the CID team investigates, they realise that Jayantilal feared being killed by his own relatives.

title: CID
subTitle: Two suspicious deaths rock the boxing world. Later, the CID probes a possible link between Vikram's fatal match and his opponent's fiery demise.

title: CID
subTitle: A woman gets shot in a moving vehicle and her ex-husband driving the car does not even realise it. Soon, the CID team is called to investigate where the bullet was fired from.

title: Danger
subTitle: An accountant working for a gangster faces a problem when a huge sum of cash goes missing.

subTitle: A man wakes up from a coma and becomes confused when everyone calls him Godse. Soon, he finds himself in the middle of a conspiracy started by a corrupt chief minister.

subTitle: Gangaram, an orphan, joins the police through hard work and determination. Soon, he becomes a force to reckon with and the bane of two powerful gangsters.

title: Baadshah Pehlwaan
subTitle: Krishna, an orphan, is nurtured by the owner of a gym whose name is Sarkar. He rises against all odds to become a wrestler but eventually gets into a conflict with his mentor when he falls in love.

title: CID
subTitle: A man calls Team CID when he finds bloodstains on his car. On investigating, the team learns that a dead body was lying on a pipe, under which the car was parked.

title: CID
subTitle: An owner of a discotheque is found murdered in an elevator. When the CID team investigates, they discover that he was killed using poisonous gas.

title: CID
subTitle: Condo residents report a gunshot, and the team find a body but no bullets at the scene. Instead, they discover a message from the victim to the investigators.

title: CID
subTitle: Condo residents report a gunshot, and the team find a body but no bullets at the scene. Instead, they discover a message from the victim to the investigators.

title: CID
subTitle: Rayma, who sees a murder while experiencing sleep paralysis, informs Team CID about it. However, her husband tells the team that the murder did not occur and that Rayma suffers from a sleep disorder.

title: CID
subTitle: Three thieves, who pulled off a big robbery, face a new challenge since the partner who hid the loot suffers from amnesia. Soon, Team CID find clues that lead them to different suspects.

title: CID
subTitle: Team CID learns of a bus with 15 passengers and failed breaks hurtling down a road. Later, a phone call asks the team to leave the bus alone or else a bomb planted under the bus will be detonated.

title: Poster Boys
subTitle: Three men face ridicule from their families and fellow villagers after they appear on a poster that promotes vasectomies. They soon embark on a mission to prove that they are victims of the system.
